title: mini statusline auto-install
goal: Add a statusline renderer (mini statusline) that reads the Claude Code JSON from stdin and prints a shortened project directory name + model + context-window usage in percent, and register it into ~/.claude/settings.json during postinstall only when the user has no statusLine configured yet (never overwrite an existing one, idempotent).

steps.title: Statusline core: JSON + transcript usage
steps.detail: New lean module src/statusline/: pure parse of the status JSON (cwd / workspace.current_dir, model.display_name, transcript_path) and usage extraction from the transcript JSONL (last message.usage, summing input_tokens + cache_read_input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens); model->window mapping (1M for Sonnet 4.x and Opus >=4.7 via version parse, else 200k) with auto-escalate when used > limit. Covered by vitest.

steps.title: Render the statusline line
steps.detail: Pure render function turning parsed data into one line: shortened basename (~24 chars + ellipsis), full model name with version, window label (1M/200k), a graphical bar (~10 cells) plus the numeric percent. Unit/snapshot tested.

steps.title: mini statusline command in CLI
steps.detail: Register a lean 'mini statusline' subcommand in cli.ts (+ --help): read JSON from stdin, call render, print the line. Keep imports minimal to avoid Node startup latency on every refresh.

steps.title: Merge statusLine into settings.json
steps.detail: Pure read-modify-write helper for ~/.claude/settings.json: add statusLine only when absent, preserve all other keys and 2-space indent, create the file if missing, recognize mini's own entry (idempotent), never overwrite a foreign one. Decide the command string (absolute mini bin path vs 'mini statusline'). Tested.

steps.title: Postinstall asks and installs statusline
steps.detail: Extend the postinstall/install flow: with a TTY and no existing statusLine, ask y/n then write via the merge helper; without a TTY skip silently; errors downgraded to a warning so npm install never fails. Tested.

steps.title: Docs: enabling and disabling the statusline
steps.detail: README: document that mini offers its statusline on install, what it shows, how to disable it (remove the statusLine block), and the 'mini statusline' command.

resolvedVerify: Status line looks right inside a live Claude Code session
